component.name: Chvarkov
component.summary: Modern Miller Columns file manager for GNOME

description.p: Chvarkov is a modern, high-performance file manager designed for the GNOME desktop. It brings the efficiency of macOS-style Miller Columns to Linux, built from the ground up using Rust, GTK4, and Libadwaita.

ul.li: Miller Columns navigation for deep directory traversal
Icon view and list view modes

description.p: Add AppImage and Flatpak packaging, cargo xtask install, and app metadata.
